posts.author: TonyaM (Tonya)
posts.cookedHtml:
About Lucid Day:
We are monday.com experts and a certified monday.com partner whose mission is to coach clients in monday.com best practices and help build their system in a way that helps them thrive and be successful. We are searching for new team members who love monday.com to our team!

The ideal candidate has a proven track record of successful web application setup, support, and strategic training in a business environment and monday.com knowledge.

Key Roles:
Service Delivery

  • Coach clients on monday.com’s basic and advanced features and best practices
  • Deliver excellent customer service via email, video calls and monday.com
  • Work with clients to understand their workflows and eliminate isolation, inefficiencies, redundancies and work silos
  • Configure boards to help support those workflows
  • Use logic to setup helpful workflow automations
  • Configure integrations with other apps
  • Implement useful integrations and automations within monday.com and utilize 3rd party integrators such as Zapier and Integromat
  • Assist Sales Director in nurturing existing clients to expand their monday.com account, engaging more of their business processes and teams
  • Provide live user training for groups of 2-50
  • Record training videos
  • Complete projects on time
  • Engage in the Monday.com community

Other

  • Assist with Marketing and Content creation as needed
  • Recommend relevant license upgrades and annual agreements
  • Collaborate with Service Delivery team in creating written training and sales materials, designing demo assets, and refining internal processes

Essential characteristics

  • Proven leader and manager
  • Outgoing, friendly and like meeting new people
  • Comfortable and confident in a fast-paced business and environment
  • Willingness to pivot quickly if an idea is not working
  • Open, honest & vulnerable
  • Confident in use of technology
  • Can-do, help first attitude
  • Love for learning and growth
  • Excellent business professional written and verbal communication
  • Exceptional organizational skills
  • Love for problem solving
  • Love getting things done
  • Emotional intelligence to be able anticipate and respond to the needs of others
  • Attention to detail
  • Ability to identify, focus on, and prioritize critical few initiatives that bring the greatest results and not get distracted
  • Work with limited resources/budget

Requirements

  • Takes ownership and initiative of the work, can work independently but has a strong sense of team
  • Desires to work in a fast-paced, fast-growing environment
  • Proficient at working from home
  • Demonstrates a strong willingness to independently learn new processes and skills
  • Exhibits critical thinker and problem-solving skills
  • 2+ years of proven experience in similar work
  • Working knowledge of Excel, JSON, webhooks is a plus
  • Experience working a project, event or product management capacity is a plus
  • Excellent oral and written communication skills
  • Bachelor’s degree in business, marketing, IT, computer science, or a related field nice to have but not required
  • Experience in B2B is a plus
  • WordPress
  • GSuite
  • LinkedIn, Facebook, and Twitter

Job Type: Full-time

Pay: From $45,000.00 per year

Benefits:

  • 401(k)
  • 401(k) matching
  • Dental insurance
  • Health insurance
  • Health savings account
  • Life insurance
  • Paid time off
  • Professional development assistance
  • Vision insurance

Schedule:

  • Monday to Friday

Education:

  • Bachelor’s (Preferred)

Experience:

  • Technical Support: 2 years (Preferred)
  • Customer Service: 2 years (Preferred)
  • monday.com: 1 year (Required)
  • Project Management: 2 years (Preferred)

Work Location: Remote

If interested, please email tonya@lucidday.com. Please include your response the Application Question(s) below, your resume and salary requirements.

Application Question(s):

  • If applicable, how have you used monday.com in the past? If you haven’t had much experience with monday.com, can you tell us about other similar work management systems you have used and to what ends?

Best,
Tonya
Lucid Day
